# Figma Onboarding Boundaries

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/contextmapdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to context-map.md](../context-map.md)

## `node-id=42-3014`, `node-id=137-6746`, `node-id=138-7389`, `node-id=164-26969`, `node-id=164-30192`, `node-id=164-27719`, `node-id=164-30206`

Daemon scope: Supplies runtime liveness/detection facts and later consumes an already-assigned instruction/runtime/model snapshot.

Not owned:

- runtime choice UI
- fixture list
- direct-setting expansion
- workspace scroll affordance
- selected-workspace rows
- new workspace rows
- two-line ellipsis annotation
- no-installed-AI skip branch

## `node-id=164-26969`, `planning node 432:46849`

Daemon scope: C4 later consumes only already-assigned instruction/runtime/model values.

Not owned:

- name input composition
- description input composition
- instruction input composition
- client-local draft
- workspace-less create path

## `node-id=137-6746`, `node-id=138-7389`

Daemon scope: Provides liveness/detection facts for client presentation.

Not owned:

- detected labels
- non-selectable labels
- radio state
- fixture rows
- direct setting row
- disabled-next presentation
- preview skeleton

## `node-id=236-29749`

Daemon scope: Starts only after the desktop/helper surface launches it and then reports runtime liveness/control-plane assignment state.

Not owned:

- macOS app download route
- Google/email sign-up
- terms consent
- member invite
- Windows waitlist
- marketing consent
- chat animation
- progress-bar references

The daemon must not hard-code:

- onboarding fixture rows
- fixture descriptions
- fixture instructions
- direct-setting entry points
- workspace selection/create-new entry points
- onboarding step skipping
- provider install/start CTAs
- client text overflow behavior
